message.content:
I need to fetch the COMPLETE source code of this file from GitHub:
https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ethereum/kohaku-extension/refs/heads/main/src/web/modules/settings/screens/NetworksSettingsScreen/NetworkForm/NetworkForm.tsx

Use WebFetch to get the content and return ALL of it - every single line. This is a React component for network settings in a wallet extension. I need the complete implementation including:
1. All imports
2. All type definitions
3. The RpcProviderSelectorItem component
4. The NetworkForm component
5. All form fields, especially the RPC provider selection section (Helios/Colibri/RPC toggles)

Do NOT summarize. Return the raw source code.

content.text: I'll fetch the complete source code from GitHub for you.

input.prompt: Return the complete, raw source code of this file without any summarization, modification, or omission. Include every single line from start to finish.
